CORRECTION to event #4 (audit F-018): the identity seam is dual-keyed content_sha256 (primary) + track_id (secondary), NOT +ISRC. ISRC is a nullable tertiary key (~25.2k/31.4k coverage). Join on track_id, not ISRC, or ~6k tracks orphan. state/hag.json + state/slut.json corrected.

Now loads .env, falls back to the START_HERE default, and skips explicitly when the DB file is absent. START_HERE banner now counts v4 'track' (was v3 'track_identity' -> always 0). Sentinel stamp/check round-trip verified (exit 0/2/3 contract intact). Residual before gate reopen: com.tagslut.integrity.plist not found in-repo (write + install), cleanroom G5 still red (7 findings, hook uninstalled), then re-verify guards 5/6.

Residual progress: plist now in-repo (slut/tools/review/); hag pre-commit hook installed; dead sandbox/benchmark_automix.py retired; stamp hook module tagslut/exec/v4_sentinel_hook.py added+tested. DISPOSITION (RELAY MSG-007, offtrack_cues): hag DECLINES. (1) The 2,236 cue rows stay OUT of music_v4.db — Offtrack cues retired (DECISIONS_LOCKED §1) + cue timing is discarded noise (§2). (2) The mixability/energy VECTOR is NOT adopted as a similarity input: it's non-reconstructable and covers only ~18k/31.4k masters, so it would bake a permanent coverage cliff conflicting with the Essentia-for-all direction (§1). (3) The already-extracted vector is retained as OPTIONAL/experimental sidecar (not regenerable, so don't discard) — never a pipeline dependency. No re-import to v4.

Phase 5/6 delivered (gate reopened per event #13 + disk re-verify): ROUTING.md at slut root — 17 audited task types, forbidden/required_context traced to guard ids G1-G6 + F-NNN, guard state encoded as-is (G5 detective-soft, G6 removed+detected, G1-G4 absent/documented-only); tools/routing/{route.py,init_db.py,log_outcome.py,routing_report.py} — sonnet-5 classifier w/ deterministic offline fallback, ambiguity>0.3 -> clarification no plan, critical -> typed ROUTE confirmation, unmatched -> escalate never guess, logs to ~/.tagtools/routing_log.db. End-to-end tested: clean route, ambiguity branch, critical refusal+confirm, outcome logging, misroute report.

SEAM CONSUMPTION CONTRACT (closes the MSG-005 integration question; pins ROUTING.md hag_mir_analysis required_context). hag consumes the identity seam via slut's PUBLISHED identity_seam.jsonl export — NOT a live DB view. Why: a live view = direct cross-boundary read of slut's DB (the pattern amnestied in build_transition_spec/offline_automix_analyzer) and it breaks in web/phone envs with no DB mounted. JSONL export is cleanroom-clean, versionable, environment-portable, and matches the spine data-release pattern. Contract: slut RE-PUBLISHES identity_seam.jsonl on identity change and announces it via kind=data-release; hag reads that file, keyed content_sha256 (primary) + track_id (secondary). ROUTING.md should cite the published export, not an inferred live query.

DECISIONS_LOCKED §11 added (operator-approved): compilations are release memberships, never duplicates — ISRC dedupe = download-avoidance only; bit-identical -> copy/hardlink into compilation, never re-download or silent skip; no ISRC regrouping of incoming releases; membership rows + per-run receipt at intake time (CSV parking lot retired). Spec: slut:docs/v4/2026-07-03-ts-stage-membership-and-receipt-spec.md (approved, rollout order inside). Also: AGENT.md/CURRENT.md v4-truth pass (F-001/F-007/F-008), RELAY F-017 provenance note, credentials.json quarantined out of hag.

MASTER_LIBRARY drift detected (20260703T114720Z): 3 hash mismatch(es), 938 missing file(s). Artifacts: artifacts/masterlib_verify/20260703T114720Z. Content mutation = irreversible; investigate before any further writes.

Drift alert #20 TRIAGED — not tampering. (1) Verifier itself was blind pre-fix (v4 relative paths vs absolute LIKE filter; fixed, slut commit). (2) The 3 mismatches: files untouched since May (mtimes), reads deterministic (local APFS, double-hash stable), actual hashes nowhere in DB -> stored hashes are STALE intake-era baselines: hash_probe_masters.py skips rows already 'complete' (line 67), so the ~10k pre-probe hashes were never re-verified after May tag-write passes. (3) The 938 missing ~= known _UNRESOLVED + present=0 population. RUNBOOK: snapshot -> hash_probe_masters.py --apply --force (full re-baseline, read-only on masters) -> sentinel stamp (NB: hash_probe lacks @stamps_v4 — add decorator or stamp manually, else the re-probe itself fires the sentinel) -> verify_master_library --sample 0 expecting clean -> daily sampled pass is then real signal. Verifier could also exclude present=0 rows to cut missing-noise.

ts-stage live-run triage (first post-audit real run): (1) intake is v3-native — $TAGSLUT_DB=v4 crashed v3-scan and silently no-opped register [OK registered=0]; SHIPPED _stage_redirect_v3_schema: stage auto-uses sibling music_v3.db (TAGSLUT_V3_DB overrides), refuses loudly otherwise. Pre-fix, stage had been registering into the EMPTY pre-move v3 — black-hole root cause #1. (2) Dry-run children report planned counters past-tense -> mutation-violation false alarm on every preview; disk+DB verified untouched; fix folded into spec §4d/§6b. (3) _stage_precheck_no_existing_files is a no-op stub. (4) .env artifacts root pointed at pre-move repo — 178MB/174 intake artifacts stranded at ~/Projects/tagslut/artifacts; .env fixed, merge pending. Bonus verified live: sentinel re-stamped by promotion_apply decorator; MASTER_LIBRARY untouched (Batu folder = May 21 fossil incl. one dismantled-comp orphan, exhibit A for LOCKED §11).

Sentinel hardening: @stamps_v4 was stamping on EVERY successful call incl. dry-runs (observed live: promotion_apply re-baselined during a ts-stage preview) — that masks out-of-band v4 writes between checks. Hook now stamps only on demonstrable execution (kwargs execute=True / dry_run=False / apply=True; argparse mains gated on argv --execute/--apply, --dry-run always wins). Fail-toward-alarm by design: missed stamp = benign false positive, wrong stamp = hidden intrusion. Unit cases + live dry-run verified (baseline unchanged). Note for callers invoking decorated library fns POSITIONALLY (e.g. merge dry_run as positional): pass dry_run/execute as KEYWORD or expect a false alarm on next check.

ts-stage hardening round complete (spec §6b-2/3 + §4d v1, commits ddbffbff+39506a85): (1) dry-run tripwire is now TRUTH-based — db size/mtime + staging inventory + library top-level snapshotted before/after; delta = real BREACH banner ('do not rerun'), no more counter false alarms; live preview exits 0, mutation_status=no_mutations_observed. (2) Ledger/receipt counters relabeled planned_* in dry-run. (3) Gutted precheck stub removed. (4) Receipt v1 SHIPPED: artifacts/intake/receipts/intake_<ts>_receipt.md per run — steps, per-file moves, artifact index; path printed at run end. Remaining spec work (next build session): §4a membership verdicts + §4b copy/hardlink materializer + §4c CSV-parking-lot retirement + children emitting planned_* natively; then the §3 migration. Operator queue unchanged: hash re-baseline (--force re-probe), old-artifacts merge (178MB).

Branch model: consolidated to single dev; dev-nmdubr merged (--no-ff, SHA 1db7bca7) + deleted local+remote. Safety tags backup/pre-consolidation-20260703{,-nmdubr} pushed. dev tip now 9a0820c5.
